info.title: seal-home Wrapped API
info.description:
HTTP contract for the seal-home wrapped backend API.

These endpoints describe the stable API that frontend developers and agents should use.
They are not the raw downstream Seal endpoints. seal-home is responsible for enterprise
selection, source authentication, response compaction, and diagnostics-friendly fields.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Wrapped authentication diagnostics and current identity.

tags.name: Approval Runs
tags.description: Wrapped approval run history, summaries, document URLs, and trace bridge helpers.

tags.name: Approval Knowledge
tags.description: Wrapped approval rules, documents, preferences, and search.

parameters.name: corpId
parameters.description: Optional local enterprise config ID. Defaults to the current selected enterprise.

schema.description: Redacted Seal enterprise config resolved from the configured source.

200.description: One rule from a published version.

parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return.

parameters.description: Creation-time lower bound in milliseconds.

parameters.name: sourceDocumentSN
parameters.description: Hose/易快报单号 or other external source document number.

parameters.name: humanResult
parameters.description: Local human result contains filter, such as 驳回 or 通过.

parameters.description: Search across record ID, source document fields, document ID, and trace fields.

parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return.

parameters.name: fields
